evals.prompt: Add a GetRoutes query that returns all routes.
evals.expected_output: Creates src/HikingLog.Application/Routes/Queries/GetRoutes.cs with a GetRoutes record, a RouteDto record, and a GetRoutesHandler returning IReadOnlyList<RouteDto>. No validator, no command.
assertions: Creates a single file GetRoutes.cs under Routes/Queries/
Uses a projection (.Select) into the DTO before ToListAsync
XML doc <summary> present on all types and members
Does NOT create a command, controller, or entity

evals.prompt: Add a GetStage query that returns a single stage by id.
evals.expected_output: Creates GetStage.cs with a GetStage(int Id) record and a GetStageHandler returning OneOf<StageDto, NotFound>. Handler returns NotFound when the stage does not exist.
assertions: Handler return type is OneOf<StageDto, NotFound>
Handler returns NotFound for a missing id

evals.prompt: Add a GetHikeLogs query that supports an optional year filter.
evals.expected_output: Creates GetHikeLogs.cs with a GetHikeLogs(int? Year) record and a handler returning IReadOnlyList<HikeLogDto> that filters by DateHiked.Year only when Year is provided.
assertions: Query record carries a nullable Year filter parameter
Handler applies the year filter conditionally (no filter when null)
